data.content: Implementation complete. Commit 9152cf99. Diff: 4 files, 26 insertions, 139 deletions. (1) populateFromCapsules now reads last.agentname/last.model/last.version directly into AgentInfo with no toActiveAgentInfo call. (2) to-active-agent-info.ts deleted entirely. (3) page-active-agent-info.test.ts deleted. (4) Re-export removed from page.tsx. Verification: grep -rn 'normalizeAgentIdentity|normalize.*Model' src/app/ returns zero hits; grep -rn 'toActiveAgentInfo|to-active-agent-info' src/ returns zero hits. Quality gates: lint pass, tsc clean, 313 test files / 3122 tests pass, build succeeds.
